reference: MINCE OR CUT INTO SMALL DICE A CARROT AN ONION ONE HEAD OF CELERY AND A FEW PARSLEY ROOTS AND TO THESE ADD A BAY LEAF A SPRIG OF THYME A LITTLE MINIONETTE PEPPER AND TWO OUNCES OF BUTTER
text: Mints were cut into small dice. A carrot, an onion, one head of celery, and a few parsley roots, and to these added a bay leaf, a sprig of thyme, a little mino net pepper, and two ounces of butter.
